titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Autographs of English Literati
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 7041186.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.abbr: beinecke manuscript unit archival processing manual
conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.beinecke manuscript unit archival processing manual

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday January 7, 2018 at 19:41
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.
beinecke.d98.xml converted for compliance with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines with brbl-migrate-01.xsl (mr2007-08-13).

PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[AUTOGRAPHS OF ENGLISH LITERATI ])//EN" "d98.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract:
MSS.
Collection of autograph letters of various English literary figures.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition note
acqinfo.p: For provenance information, consult the appropriate curator.

userestrict.head: Ownership Copyright
userestrict.p: Osborn d98 is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Autographs of English Literati. James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

processinfo.head: Processing Notes
processinfo.p: This finding aid was produced from a previously existing list or card set. All pertinent bibliographical information has been retained; the volume may contain additional unlisted material.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Papers
scopecontent.p: The following finding aid is a complete inventory of the contents of Osborn d98. This list was reformatted from previously existing cataloging.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Berners Street
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Discusses proofs which he would like
to see.
d.98/229

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Asks for permission to use the
"Annual Register" of Robert Dodsley
(1702-1764) for the year 1761.
d.98/79

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
British Museum
1 p.; 18 x 12 cm.
d.98/169

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Dudley
3 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Inquires as to selling a portion of
his collection of books.
d.98/67

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Gt. Russell St.
1 p.; 19 x 13 cm.
Invitation to dinner.
d.98/241

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
10 Tavistock Place
1 p.; 11 x 13 cm.
Inquires about prints of topography
and antiquities.
d.98/77

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Tavistock Place
1 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Sends on a pamphlet and inquires
about prints.
d.98/191

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Greenwich
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
List of items he wishes to purchase.
d.98/165

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Fleet Street
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Asks him to use the services of a
Mrs. Vickers for printers parchment
as "it will be a real charity to an
honest deserving Widow with 4
children."
d.98/249

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 20 x 13 cm.
Concerns the bankruptcy of a Mr.
Stace.
d.98/195

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 15 x 11 cm.
Requests certain stamps and that
some books be sent to a client of
his in the East Indies.
d.98/237

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Howland Street
1 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Presents the recipient with "the
whole of the "Oriental Scenery""
published in 1808.
d.98/1

did.unittitle: AL to Geoffrey O'Brien Wyndham, 3rd earl of Egremont (1751-1837)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
9 Cleveland Street
1 p.; 20 x 12 cm.
Sends the first volume of the
"voyage round Great Britain."
d.98/5

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Abergavenny
1 p.; 11 x 16 cm.
Sends a bill. d.98/209

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Kensington
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Sends the recipient's brother to his
publisher for copies of his books.
d.98/11

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 13 x 20 cm.
Sends a corrected copy of a
manuscript.
d.98/227

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Barnes Terrace
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Order for port and sherry.
d.98/179

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: Islington 2 p.; 19 x 12 cm. Discusses the recipients work to be taken by the author of the letter. d.98/223

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Gen. Post Office
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Inquires as to whether he has
received any mail.
d.98/55

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: [London] 1 p.; 17 x 10 cm. Discusses the publishability of a work. d.98/85

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Killesandra
2 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Requests material.
d.98/135

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
1809 Aug 16 and Sep 8 Ely Place and Dulwich. 5 p.; 20 x 12 cm. Both letters discuss the publication of a work concerning public charityand about which the author consulted
Sir Richard Phillips (1767-1840).
d.98/251, 255

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Tavistock St.
2 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Instructs the recipient to place the
matter concerning "Sir Gerard" into
an attorney's hands.
d.98/155

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Lee Priory
1 p.; 10 x 13 cm.
Requests fifty copies of a book on
behalf of the authoress who is not named.
d.98/215

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Tunbridge
1 p.; 11 x 15 cm.
Concerns revisions to his text.
d.98/245

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Devonshire Street [London]
1 p.; 21 x 13 cm.
Requests that the enclosed statement,
now missing, be included in the
paper.
d.98/159

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Recommendation for a "pressman."
d.98/115

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Exeter
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Returns a misprinted copy of his
work.
d.98/25

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Inner Temple
1 p.; 16 x 13 cm.
Requests that all copies of his
"Historia Anglicana Selecta
Monumenta" be sent to Mr. Robert
Wilkes, printer.
d.98/183

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 11 x 16 cm.
Sends more copy for the 6th volume
of the "Scriptores Logarithmici".
d.98/71

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
41 Haymarket
1 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Inquires whether Wilkes will
undertake a printing.
d.98/17

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
British Museum
1 p.; 19 x 12 cm.
Prefers to have a copy of "Johnson's
Letters" (Samuel Johnson, 1709-1784)
in calf rather than in sheepskin.
d.98/221

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Hampstead
1 p.; 14 x 12 cm.
Returns an corrected version of a
manuscript to be printed.
d.98/197

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
London
1 p.; 20 x 12 cm.
Explains that Perry will not be sent
for by the court until necessary and
that when he is asked he should
bring the manuscript in question.
d.98/113

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
College of Arms
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Replies to an earlier correspondence
and sends the recipient elsewhere
for proper reply to his question.
d.98/217

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[Greenwich]
1 p.; 18 x 12 cm.
Sends corrections.
d.98/259

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
St. James's Place
1 p.; 11 x 9 cm.
Requests a woodcut.
d.98/235

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Reigate
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Sends proofs and corrections.
d.98/33

did.unittitle: ST. LEONARDS, EDWARD BURTENSHAW SUGDEN, BARON, 1781-1875

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Lincolns Inn
1 p.; 18 x 13 cm.
Apologizes for the delay he may have
caused; accompanied by a slip noting
approval of a draft.
d.98/139

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 15 x 9 cm.
Sent with his corrections.
d.98/61

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Cockspur St.
1 p.; 7 x 18 cm.
Instructions not to bind his books
as he may have more material.
d.98/133

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 16 x 11 cm.
Requests that books be sent to Aaron
Arrowsmith (1750-1823).
d.98/101

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Sandhurst
2 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Requests another copy of his
"Prospectus."
d.98/45

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
London Institution
3 p.; 21 x 13 cm.
Concerns the value of a Virgil
printed at Venice.
d.98/211

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
London Institution
1 p.; 10 x 20 cm. Order for 3 sets of "Topography."
d.98/43

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
n.p.
1 p.; 6 x 12 cm.
Order for catalogues.
d.98/41

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
Reading
2 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Inquires about a lost sheet of
corrections.
d.98/73

did.unittitle: AL to Lackington, Allen and Co.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[Reading]
2 p.; 18 x 11 cm.
Places an additional order.
d.98/37

did.unittitle: Memorandum: autograph MS endorsed by Isaac Reed (1742-1807)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p: 2 p.; 21 x 13 cm. On Alexander Pope (1688-1744) and given to Reed. d.98/239

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents note
scopecontent.p:
[London]
1 p.; 19 x 11 cm.
Requests that corrections to his MS
be made as soon as possible.
d.98/59
